title: Can i create a item via API and upload a file to a file column at once
excerpt: Im starting my first steps, and i dont see how can i create a item and upload a file in the same line. Can anyone help me here.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Im starting my first steps, and i dont see how can i create a item and upload a file in the same line. Can anyone help me here.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hlopezvc!

I see you also wrote into our appsupport@ email with this same query.

At this time, you are unable to both create an item and upload a file using one API method. To upload a file, you would need either the add_file_to_update or add_file_to_column mutation methods.

Let me know if you have other questions!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
